title: Upon Julia's Breasts.
content:
Display thy breasts, my Julia - there let me
    Behold that circummortal purity,
    Between whose glories there my lips I'll lay,
    Ravish'd in that fair via lactea.
meaning:
"Upon Julia's Breasts." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
